qa_pairs.question: How do I log into a login node for the Trillium CPU subcluster?
qa_pairs.answer: You can log into a login node of the CPU subcluster by using the command: `ssh -i /PATH/TO/SSH_PRIVATE_KEY MYALLIANCEUSERNAME@trillium.scinet.utoronto.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the command to log into the login node for the Trillium GPU cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To log into the login node for the GPU cluster, use the command: `ssh -i /PATH/TO/SSH_PRIVATE_KEY MYALLIANCEUSERNAME@trillium-gpu.scinet.utoronto.ca`.

qa_pairs.question: What do the placeholders in the Trillium SSH login commands refer to?
qa_pairs.answer: In the SSH login commands, `/PATH/TO/SSH_PRIVATE_KEY` is the path to your private SSH key, and `MYALLIANCEUSERNAME` is your username on the CCDB.
